name: Bitwise XRP ETF
business: The Trust is an exchange traded product that issues common shares listed on NYSE Arca to provide exposure to the value of XRP, less expenses. The Trust's sole asset is XRP. The Trust was organized on October 31, 2025 under Delaware law and commenced operations on November 19, 2025.

exposures.sentence: The Trust's primary investment objective is to seek to provide exposure to the value of XRP held by the Trust, less the expenses of the Trust's operations, which is generally just the sponsor's management fee.
